languages.text: "Тут дело не в политике, а в данной клятве. Вы присягали Богу-Императору, а не Себериану. Теперь же идете против слуг Его".

traits.locale_text: "Тут дело не в политике, а в данной клятве. Вы присягали Богу-Императору, а не Себериану. Теперь же идёте против слуг Его".

languages.text: "This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."
languages.original_text: "Тут дело не в политике, а в данной клятве. Вы присягали Богу-Императору, а не Себериану. Теперь же идете против слуг Его".

traits.locale_text: "This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."
"This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."
"This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."

languages.text: “这无关政治，是誓言问题。你宣誓效忠的是神皇，不是塞贝里安。如今你却要与祂的仆从为敌。”
languages.original_text: "This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."

traits.locale_text: “这无关政治，是誓言问题。你宣誓效忠的是神皇，不是塞贝里安。如今你却要与祂的仆从为敌。”

languages.text: « Ce n'est pas une question de politique, mais de serment. C'est à l'Empereur-Dieu que vous avez prêté allégeance, pas à Seberian. Et maintenant, vous vous opposez à Ses serviteurs. »
languages.original_text: "This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."

traits.locale_text: « Ce n'est pas une question de politique, mais de serment. C'est à l'Empereur-Dieu que vous avez prêté allégeance, pas à Seberian. Et maintenant, vous vous opposez à Ses serviteurs. »

languages.text: "Mesele siyaset değil, yemin. Sen Seberian'a değil, Tanrı İmparator'a yemin ettin. Şimdi O'nun hizmetkârlarına karşı geliyorsun."
languages.original_text: "This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."

traits.locale_text: "Mesele siyaset değil, yemin. Sen Seberian'a değil, Tanrı İmparator'a yemin ettin. Şimdi O'nun hizmetkârlarına karşı geliyorsun."

languages.text: «Esto no es cosa de política, sino de juramentos. Usted hizo un juramento al Dios Emperador, no a Seberian. Ahora se cuenta entre Sus sirvientes».
languages.original_text: "This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."

traits.locale_text: «Esto no es cosa de política, sino de juramentos. Usted hizo un juramento al Dios Emperador, no a Seberian. Ahora se cuenta entre Sus sirvientes».

languages.text: "Das ist keine Frage der Politik, sondern von Eiden. Ihr habt nicht Seberian, sondern dem Gottimperator einen Eid geschworen. Und nun wendet Ihr Euch gegen Seine Diener."
languages.original_text: "This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist keine Frage der Politik, sondern von Eiden. Ihr habt nicht Seberian, sondern dem Gottimperator einen Eid geschworen. Und nun wendet Ihr Euch gegen Seine Diener."

languages.text: 「これは政治の問題ではなく、誓いの問題だ。お前たちは神皇帝に誓った。シベリアに誓ったのではない。今、お前たちは神皇帝の使いに逆らうのだ」
languages.original_text: "This is not a matter of politics, but oaths. You swore an oath to the God-Emperor, not Seberian. Now you are going against His servants."

traits.locale_text: 「これは政治の問題ではなく、誓いの問題だ。お前たちは神皇帝に誓った。シベリアに誓ったのではない。今、お前たちは神皇帝の使いに逆らうのだ」
